title: euphrasia pratensis var. minima
intro: Euphrasia pratensis var. minima, also known as small alpine eye-cress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Orobanchaceae, which is known for its unique parasitic characteristics. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various eye and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Euphrasia pratensis var. minima include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and soothing irritated eyes and mucous membranes. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in the form of tinctures, teas, and infusions, as well as in eye drops and salves, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal medicine.
